documentsHub.heroSubheadline: Skanerlenen ýa-da sanly PDF ýükläň we arassa terjime edilen görnüşi alyň. Ähli esasy resmi resminama görnüşleri goldanýar — pasportlar, bank beýannamalary, diplomlar, şahadatnamalar we başgalar.
documentsHub.finalCtaSub: Islendik resmi PDF ýükläň we 2–5 minutda arassa terjime alyň.

faq.q: Haýsy resminama görnüşlerini goldaýarsyňyz?
faq.a: Biz ähli esasy resmi resminama görnüşlerini goldaýarys: pasportlar, ID kartlar, bank beýannamalary, diplomlar, transkriptler, dogluş we nikah şahadatnamalary, zähmet şertnamalary, lukmançylyk ýazgylary, polisiýa arassaçylyk şahadatnamalary, sürüjilik şahadatnamalary we umumy resmi resminamalar.

faq.q: Haýsy diller goldanýar?
faq.a: Biz iňlis, rus, hytaý, koreý, ýapon, nemes, fransuz, ispan we arap dillerini öz içine alýan 10+ dili goldaýarys. Çeşme dil awtomatik anyklanylýar.

faq.q: Terjimeleriňiz sertifikatlanandyrmy ýa-da notarius tassyklananmy?
faq.a: Ýok. Ähli terjimeler resmi däl we diňe maglumat üçin. Her terjime edilen sahypada görünýän duýduryş pikirlendirme teksti peýda bolýar. Sertifikatlanan ýa-da notarius tassyklanan terjimeler litsenzirlenedilen terjimeçi ýa-da notariusdan alynmalydyr.

kazakhstan.heroAccentLine: Okuw, migrasiýa we resmi iş akymlary
kazakhstan.heroSubheadline: Diplomlary, dogluş şahadatnamalaryny, şertnamalary, bank beýannamalaryny we resmi resminamalary onlaýn terjime ediň. Halkara iş akymlary üçin talyp okuwçylar, migrasiýa maslahatçylary, notariuslar we wiza agentleri tarapyndan ulanylýar.
kazakhstan.finalCtaHeadline: Resminamalaryňyzy onlaýn terjime ediň — edara baryp görmezden
kazakhstan.finalCtaSub: PDF ýükläň we 2–5 minutda arassa terjime edilen görnüşi alyň.

faq.q: Notariusa barmazdan ozal bu terjimäni ulanyp bilerinmi?
faq.a: Hawa. Köpüsi notariuslar we sertifikatlanan terjimeçiler sertifikatlanan görnüşi tamamlamazdan ozal resmi däl terjime eskizini gözden geçirýärler. Arassa, gurluşly WPO terjimesi bu gürrüňi çaltlaşdyryp we soňky sertifikatlanan resminamadaky ýalňyşlyklary azaldyp biler.

faq.q: Gazagystanly resminamalar üçin haýsy dilleri goldaýarsyňyz?
faq.a: Biz esasy jübütler hökmünde rus ↔ iňlis we iňlis → rusy goldaýarys. Gazak ↔ rus we gazak → iňlis hem goldanýar. Bular Gazagystanly resminamalar üçin halkara maqsatlarda esasy iş akymlaryny öz içine alýar.

faq.q: Bu terjime daşary ýurt uniwersitetleri tarapyndan kabul edilýärmi?
faq.a: Daşary ýurt uniwersitetleri adatda sertifikatlanan ýa-da notarius tassyklanan terjimeçileri talap edýär. WPO arza taýýarlyk tapgyrynda, bilim maslahatçylary tarapyndan gözden geçirmek üçin ýa-da sertifikatlanan terjimeçi üçin salgylanma eskizi hökmünde ulanylyp bilinýän resmi däl terjimeler berýär.

faq.q: Notariuslar we wiza agentleri müşderileriň adyndan bu hyzmaty ulanyp bilerlermi?
faq.a: Hawa. Islendik ulanyjy müşderiniň resminamasyny ýükläp, gaýtadan işläp we terjime edilen PDF alyp biler. Agentlikler üçin hyzmatdaş dolandyryş paneli geljekdäki çykarylyş üçin meýilleşdirilýär.

faq.q: Apostil näme we terjime oňa täsir edýärmi?
faq.a: Apostil — hükümet edarasy tarapyndan bir resminamada ulanylýan resmi tassyklama möhüri. Apostil asyl resminama degişli. Terjime — apostil alynandan soň köplenç talap edilýän aýratyn ädim. WPO terjime ädimini üpjün edýär; apostil degişli hükümet edarasyndan alynmalydyr.

kazakhstan.docsSubheadline: All major document types used in study, migration, and official workflows
kazakhstan.painHeadline: Document translation in Kazakhstan — common bottlenecks
kazakhstan.pain1Title: Translation bureaus charge per page and require physical presence
kazakhstan.pain1Desc: Most certified translation offices in Kazakhstan require you to come in person with originals, wait several days, and pay significant per-page fees for what can be a 2-page diploma.
kazakhstan.pain2Title: Notary appointments need a complete translation draft in advance
kazakhstan.pain2Desc: Many notaries and certified translators in Kazakhstan work faster and more accurately when they have a clean first-pass translation to review, rather than starting from scratch.
kazakhstan.pain3Title: International university applications require precise English formatting
kazakhstan.pain3Desc: Foreign universities evaluating Kazakhstani diplomas want clean, readable English transcriptions — not literal word-for-word renderings that lose structural context.
kazakhstan.pain4Title: Migration and apostille workflows involve many documents at once
kazakhstan.pain4Desc: Preparing for relocation, work abroad, or foreign university admission often means translating 5–10 documents simultaneously. The timeline becomes the main constraint.
kazakhstan.pricingSubheadline: No subscription. Pay only for the translation you choose.
kazakhstan.seoHeadline: Document Translation for Kazakhstan — When and How to Use
kazakhstan.seoParagraph1: In Kazakhstan, document translations are often needed for enrolling in foreign universities, work visas, relocation, immigration procedures, opening bank accounts abroad, and apostille. The traditional route through a translation bureau can require a personal visit, waiting time, and manual document handoff.
kazakhstan.seoParagraph2: WorldPrimeOnline helps prepare translations online: upload a document, choose a language pair and service level, and receive the result in electronic format. Electronic translation is suitable for preparation and reference. Official translation with translator review, translator signature, and Provider stamp is available as a separate service level. Notarial certification is arranged separately through partners where available.
kazakhstan.seoParagraph3: Acceptance of translations by third parties is not guaranteed. Before submitting a document to a bank, university, consulate, immigration authority, or notary, verify the requirements of the receiving party.

kazakhstanNotarized.heroAccentLine: Notariat gözden geçirmek we sertifikatlamak üçin
kazakhstanNotarized.heroSubheadline: Resminamaňyzy ýükläň we notariusa ýa-da sertifikatlanan terjimeçä hödürlemäge taýyn arassa, gurluşly rus ýa-da iňlis terjimesini alyň. Gözden geçiriş wagtyny gysgaldyň, ýalňyşlyklary azaldyň, umumy çykdajylary peseltdiň.
kazakhstanNotarized.finalCtaHeadline: Notariat duşuşyklaryna gitmezden ozal terjimaňyzy taýarlaň
kazakhstanNotarized.finalCtaSub: Resminamaňyzy ýükläň we 2–5 minutda gurluşly terjime alyň. 2 290 ₸-dan.

faq.q: Bu sertifikatlanan ýa-da notarius tassyklanan terjimemi?
faq.a: Ýok. WPO maglumat we taýýarlyk maksatly resmi däl terjime eskizlerini berýär. Sertifikatlanan ýa-da notarius tassyklanan terjime litsenzirlenedilen terjimeçi ýa-da notarius tarapyndan taýarlanmalydyr. WPO eskizleri bu prosese girip biler, ýöne ony çalşyp bilmez.

faq.q: Notariusym WPO terjime eskizini başlangyç nokat hökmünde kabul edermi?
faq.a: Köpüsi notariuslar we sertifikatlanan terjimeçiler öňünden taýarlanan eskizden işlemäge taýyndyr. Bu olaryň işini çaltlaşdyrýar we ýalňyşlyk ähtimallygyny azaldýar. Emma ähli notariuslar daşky eskizleri kabul etmeýär — bu iş akymyny ulanmazdan ozal öz notariusynyz bilen tassyklaň.

faq.q: Haýsy diller goldanýar?
faq.a: Rus ↔ iňlis, gazak → iňlis we gazak → rus. Bular halkara maqsatlar üçin Gazagystanda taýarlanan resminamalar üçin esasy dil jübütlerini öz içine alýar.

faq.q: Notarius ýa-da migrasiýa maslahatçysy hökmünde bu hizmaty ulanyp bilerinmi?
faq.a: Hawa. Müşderi resminamalaryny ýükläp, olaryň adyndan terjime edilen eskizleri alyp bilersiňiz. Aýratyn hyzmatdaş iş akymy işlenip düzülýär.

faq.q: TODO_I18N Сколько времени занимает нотариальное удостоверение?
faq.a: TODO_I18N Электронный перевод обычно готов за несколько минут. Официальный перевод и нотариальное удостоверение требуют дополнительного времени, потому что в процесс вовлекаются переводчик и/или нотариус-партнёр.

kazakhstanNotarized.docsHeadline: Document types commonly prepared for notary review
kazakhstanNotarized.painHeadline: Notary translation appointments take longer than necessary
kazakhstanNotarized.pain1Title: Notaries start from scratch on every document
kazakhstanNotarized.pain1Desc: Without a pre-prepared draft, a notary or certified translator reads the original, dictates, and constructs the translation during the appointment — a slow, billable process.
kazakhstanNotarized.pain2Title: Errors in the first draft cost time and money to correct
kazakhstanNotarized.pain2Desc: Name transliterations, date formatting, and institution names are common error points. A pre-processed draft identifies these before the certified version is produced.
kazakhstanNotarized.pain3Title: Multiple documents multiply the wait time
kazakhstanNotarized.pain3Desc: University or migration packages often involve 5–10 documents. Preparing drafts for all of them before one notary session significantly reduces the overall timeline.
kazakhstanNotarized.pain4Title: Clients arrive unprepared, extending appointment duration
kazakhstanNotarized.pain4Desc: For notaries and visa agents, clients who arrive with a clear draft are faster to process. The translated draft also helps clients understand what they are signing.

kazakhstanUniversity.heroSubheadline: Beýik Britaniýa, ABŞ, Ýewropa, Kanada we başga ýurtlardaky uniwersitetlere arza bermek üçin diplomlaryň, transkriptleriň, mekdep şahadatnamalarynyň we akademiki ýazgylaryň arassa iňlis terjimelerini alyň.
kazakhstanUniversity.heroTrustLine: 2 590 ₸-dan · Diplom we transkript formatlary · RU / EN
kazakhstanUniversity.finalCtaSub: Diplomyňyzy, transkriptiňizi ýa-da akademiki şahadatnamaňyzy ýükläň we birnäçe minutda arassa iňlis terjimesini alyň.

faq.q: Daşary ýurt uniwersitetleri WPO terjimesini kabul edermi?
faq.a: Talap uniwersitete we ýurda baglydyr. Köp uniwersitetler başlangyç arza gözden geçiriş üçin resmi däl terjimelerini kabul edýär, sertifikatlanan terjimeler diňe kabul edilenden soň ýa-da hasaba alynmak wagtynda talap edilýär. Maksat uniwersitetiňiz üçin ýörite talaplary elmydama barlaň.

faq.q: "Mekdebi tamamlama şahadatnamasy" (Attestat) näme?
faq.a: Attestat — Gazagystanyň orta mekdebi tamamlama şahadatnamasy. Ähli dersler boýunça soňky bahalary hasaba alýar. Biz ähli dersleriň atlaryny, bahalary we hünär jikme-jikliklerini öz içine alýan doly resminamy arassa iňlisce terjime edýäris.

faq.q: Baha skalasyny we bahalama ulgamyny saklap galýaňyzmy?
faq.a: Hawa. Asyl bahalary görkezilişi ýaly saklap galýarys (meselem, 5 ballyk ýa-da 100 ballyk skala) we terjime edilen resminamada bahalama ulgamyny belleýäris. Bahalary öwürmeýäris ýa-da hiç hili ýorum goşmaýarys.

faq.q: IELTS, TOEFL ýa-da tasdyknama bahalama maksatly resminamalary terjime edip bilersiňizmi?
faq.a: WPO terjimeçileri resmi däl. Olar resmi bal habar bermek üçin IELTS/TOEFL administratiw edaralary tarapyndan kabul edilmeýär. Emma olar öz taýýarlyk, resmi däl arza gözden geçiriş ýa-da sertifikatlanan terjime iş akymyna giriş üçin ulanylyp bilner.

kazakhstanUniversity.painHeadline: University application translation — where it gets complicated
kazakhstanUniversity.pain1Title: International universities require precise academic terminology
kazakhstanUniversity.pain1Desc: A diploma from a Kazakhstani university contains specific field-of-study names, department names, and qualification titles that must be translated using internationally recognised terminology.
kazakhstanUniversity.pain2Title: Transcripts have structured tables — poorly formatted output gets rejected
kazakhstanUniversity.pain2Desc: Academic transcripts contain subject names, credit hours, and grades in tabular format. Generic translation tools convert them to unstructured text. WPO preserves the structure.
kazakhstanUniversity.pain3Title: Tight admission deadlines leave no time for agency delays
kazakhstanUniversity.pain3Desc: University application windows are narrow. Getting a translation in 2–5 minutes versus waiting days from a bureau can determine whether you submit on time.
kazakhstanUniversity.pain4Title: Education consultants need fast drafts for multiple clients at once
kazakhstanUniversity.pain4Desc: Agencies handling multiple university applications simultaneously need a scalable, fast translation tool — not a per-client bureau negotiation.

passportTranslation.heroSubheadline: Pasport ýa-da ID kart skanini ýükläň we arassa, gurluşly terjimeni alyň. Ähli biografik maglumatlar, resminama sanlary, seneler we şahsy maglumatlary edil görkezilişi ýaly saklanýar.
passportTranslation.finalCtaSub: Pasport skaniňizi ýükläň we birnäçe minutda arassa, gurluşly iňlis terjimesini alyň.

faq.q: Terjimä haýsy pasport maglumatlary girizilýär?
faq.a: Pasport maglumatlar sahypasynda ähli görünýän meýdanlary terjime edýäris: familiýa, at(lar), milleti, doglan senesi, doglan ýeri, jynsy, berlen senesi, möhleti, pasport sany, berýän organ we MRZ zola mazmunlary. Şahsy atlar maksat skriptine transliterasiýa edilýär.

faq.q: Pasport haýsy dillere terjime edilip bilner?
faq.a: Biz iňlis, rus, hytaý, koreý, ýapon, nemes, fransuz, ispan we arap dillerini öz içine alýan 10+ maksat dili goldaýarys. Çeşme dil awtomatik anyklanylýar ýa-da el bilen görkezilip bilner.

faq.q: Terjime wiza arzalary üçin kabul edilýärmi?
faq.a: Terjimelerimiziň resmi däl we maglumat üçin. Käbir konsullylar asyl pasport bilen birlikde resmi däl terjime nusga kabul edýär. Beýlekileri sertifikatlanan terjimeler talap edýär. Elmydama öz ilçihanañyz ýa-da konsullygyňyz bilen haýsy derejeli terjimaň talap edilýändigini tassyklaň.

faq.q: Atlar terjimede nädip işlenýär?
faq.a: Şahsy atlar pasport görnüşli resminamalar üçin ICAO 9303 standartlaryna laýyklykda we beýleki skriptler üçin standart transliterasiýa düzgünlerine görä transliterasiýa edilýär. Atlar hiç wagt semantik taýdan terjime edilmeýär.

faq.q: Pasport maglumatlarym howpsuzmy?
faq.a: Resminamaňyz şifrelenmedik Cloudflare R2 saklaýjyda işlenýär we saklanýar. Ol 30 günden soň awtomatik pozulýar. Pasportyňyzdaky şahsy maglumatlary terjimäni döretmekden başga maksatlar üçin saklamaýarys, paýlaşmaýarys ýa-da ulanmaýarys.

diplomaTranslation.heroSubheadline: Uniwersitet arzalary, hünärmen litsenzirlemesi, ygtybarnama bahalama we halkara iş üçin diplomlary, dereje şahadatnamalaryny we akademiki transkriptleri terjime ediň.
diplomaTranslation.heroTrustLine: Resminama üçin 2 590 ₸ · Akademiki terminologiýa saklanýar · 10+ dil
diplomaTranslation.finalCtaHeadline: Diplom ýa-da akademiki transkriptiňizi terjime ediň
diplomaTranslation.finalCtaSub: Akademiki ygtybarnama ýükläň we birnäçe minutda arassa, gurluşly iňlis terjimesini alyň.

faq.q: Terjimaňyz WES ýa-da beýleki ygtybarnama bahalama üçin kabul edilýärmi?
faq.a: WES (World Education Services) we köpüsi ygtybarnama bahalama edaralary sertifikatlanan ýa-da notarius tassyklanan terjimeler talap edýär. WPO taýýarlyk döwründe, bilim maslahatçylary tarapyndan ýa-da sertifikatlanan terjime iş akymyna giriş hökmünde ulanylyp bilinýän resmi däl terjimeler berýär. Tabşyrmazdan ozal resmi talaplary barlaň.

faq.q: Diplom goşundylaryny we baha düşündirişlerini terjime edýärsiňizmi?
faq.a: Hawa. Diplom goşundylary, baha skalasy düşündirişleri we goşulan akademiki transkriptler resminamy bir bölegi hökmünde terjime edilýär. Ders atlary standart akademiki iňlis terminologiýasy ulanylyp terjime edilýär.

faq.q: Diplom terjimesi üçin haýsy dilleri goldaýarsyňyz?
faq.a: Biz 10+ dili goldaýarys. Diplom terjimesi üçin iň ýaýran jübütler: rus → iňlis, gazak → iňlis we hytaý → iňlis. Çeşme dil awtomatik anyklanylýar.

faq.q: Dereje atlary we akademiki bahalary nädip işleýärsiňiz?
faq.a: Dereje atlary gerek ýerinde düşündiriş konteksti bilen terjime edilýär (meselem, "Hünärmen derejesi (5 ýyllyk birleşdirilen maksatnama)"). Bahalar öwürmezden asyl skala boýunça saklanýar.

faq.q: Bunu hünärmen litsenzirlemesi arzasy üçin ulanyp bilerinmi?
faq.a: Köpüsi litsenzirlemesi geňeşleri daşary ýurt hünärmenleriniň sertifikatlanan ýa-da notarius tassyklanan terjimelerini talap edýär. WPO taýýarlyk we salgylanma üçin resmi däl terjimeler berýär. Litsenzirlemesi geňeşiňiz bilen sertifikatlaşdyrma talaplaryny tassyklaň.

diplomaTranslation.painHeadline: Diploma translation challenges — what goes wrong
diplomaTranslation.pain1Title: Academic institution names must be translated with care
diplomaTranslation.pain1Desc: University and faculty names have official international forms. Incorrectly translating a university name raises immediate flags with reviewers.
diplomaTranslation.pain2Title: Qualification titles are not universal — context matters
diplomaTranslation.pain2Desc: A Russian 'specialist' degree is not simply a bachelor's degree. Credential evaluators expect accurate description of the qualification type, duration, and field.
diplomaTranslation.pain3Desc: Academic transcripts contain structured course listings with credits, grades, and subject codes. Translation tools that flatten tables into prose produce unusable output.
diplomaTranslation.pain4Title: Tight deadlines for credential evaluation services
diplomaTranslation.pain4Desc: WES, ICAS, and other credential evaluation bodies often have document submission deadlines. Having a fast translation tool available means you can submit on time.

bankStatementTranslation.heroAccentLine: Wiza, immigrasiýa we girdeji subut edişi üçin
bankStatementTranslation.heroSubheadline: Bank beýannamalaryny islendik dilden iňlis ýa-da beýleki maksat dillerine terjime ediň. Ähli galyndy, geçirim seneleri, hasap sanlary we walýuta mukdarlary edil görkezilişi ýaly saklanýar.
bankStatementTranslation.heroTrustLine: Resminama üçin 2 590 ₸ · 2–5 minut · Islendik bank, islendik ýurt
bankStatementTranslation.finalCtaHeadline: Wiza ýa-da immigrasiýa üçin bank beýannamamyzy terjime ediň
bankStatementTranslation.finalCtaSub: Bank beýannamamyzy ýükläň we 2–5 minutda arassa iňlis terjimesini alyň.

faq.q: Haýsy wiza görnüşleri terjime edilen bank beýannamasyny talap edýär?
faq.a: Şengen wizalary, Beýik Britaniýa myhman wizalary, ABŞ B1/B2 wizalary we köpüsi immigrasiýa arzalary adatda iňlis dilinde bankdan mablag subut edişini talap edýär. Girdeji şahadatnamalary we aýlyk hatlar ýaly beýleki resminamalar hem köplenç talap edilýär.

faq.q: Walýutalar we mukdarlar öwürmezden saklanýarmy?
faq.a: Hawa. Ähli mukdarlar, walýutalar we galyndylar asyl resminamada görkezilişi ýaly saklanýar. Walýutalary öwürmeýäris, mukdarlary tegelenmeýäris ýa-da maliýe maglumatlaryny hiç hili düşündirmeýäris.

faq.q: Bank beýannamam 6 sahypaly bolsa näme?
faq.a: Biz 50 sahypa çenli bank beýannamalaryny goldaýarys. Resminama üçin baha şol çäkde sahypa sanyna garamazdan ulanylýar. Ähli sahypalar bir resminamy hökmünde terjime edilýär.

faq.q: Terjime edilen beýannama konsullygymy tarapyndan kabul edilýärmi?
faq.a: Terjimelerimiziň resmi däl. Köpüsi konsullylar asyl beýannama bilen birlikde resmi däl terjimeleri kabul edýär. Beýlekileri sertifikatlanan terjimeni talap edýär. Öz konsullygynyz ýa-da wiza agentiňiz bilen talaplary barlaň.

faq.q: Onlaýn bank skrinşotlaryny ýa-da PDF eksportlaryny terjime edip bilersiňizmi?
faq.a: Hawa. Skanerlenen kagyzy beýannamalar we onlaýn bankçylyk ulgamyndan sanly PDF eksportlary hem goldanýar. Skanerlenen resminamalar terjimeden ozal OCR arkaly işlenýär.

bankStatementTranslation.docsHeadline: Bank and financial document types supported
bankStatementTranslation.painHeadline: Why getting your bank statement translated is harder than it should be
bankStatementTranslation.pain1Title: Visa consulates require English bank statements — most banks don't offer them
bankStatementTranslation.pain1Desc: Banks in Russia, Kazakhstan, and many other countries issue statements only in their local language. Embassies and consulates reviewing visa applications typically require English translations.
bankStatementTranslation.pain2Title: Numbers and amounts must be perfectly preserved — no rounding, no conversion
bankStatementTranslation.pain2Desc: Bank statements used for visa or mortgage applications must show exact original amounts in original currency. Any conversion or rounding creates a discrepancy that can cause rejection.
bankStatementTranslation.pain3Title: Transaction-level detail must be readable and structured
bankStatementTranslation.pain3Desc: A bank statement with 50 transactions must remain a table — not a paragraph. Generic translation tools collapse structure into unformatted text.
bankStatementTranslation.pain4Title: Tight visa deadlines make waiting 3–5 days for a bureau unacceptable
bankStatementTranslation.pain4Desc: DTV, Schengen, and other visa applications have narrow windows. Getting your bank statement translated in minutes, not days, can determine whether your application is ready on time.

kazakhstanCertified.heroSubheadline: Order an official translation with translator review, translator signature, and Provider stamp. For banks, universities, migration, visa, and official purposes.
kazakhstanCertified.heroTrustLine: Acceptance of the translation by third parties is not guaranteed and depends on the requirements of the receiving organization.
kazakhstanCertified.painHeadline: Official Translation — a Separate Service Level
kazakhstanCertified.pain1Desc: The translation is reviewed by a human translator. OCR errors, terminology, and formatting are corrected as needed.
kazakhstanCertified.pain2Desc: The final document may include a translator signature and translator block.
kazakhstanCertified.pain3Desc: For the official service level, a Provider stamp may be added to the document.
kazakhstanCertified.pain4Desc: Banks, universities, consulates, and other organizations may have their own requirements. These should be verified in advance.
kazakhstanCertified.finalCtaSub: Upload a document, choose the official service level, and review the final price before payment.

faq.q: What does certified translation mean at WPO?
faq.a: At WPO, certified translation means the official service level: the translation is reviewed by a human translator and may include a translator signature, Provider stamp, date, and translator block. It does not automatically mean notarial certification or guaranteed acceptance by third parties.

faq.q: How does certified translation differ from electronic translation?
faq.a: Electronic translation is performed automatically using OCR and AI, without a translator signature, Provider stamp, or notarial certification. Certified / official translation undergoes translator review and may include a translator signature and Provider stamp.

faq.q: Is this a notarized translation?
faq.a: No. WPO certified / official translation is not notarial certification by itself. Notarization is arranged separately through a partner process, if this service is available for the selected document, language pair, and jurisdiction.

faq.q: Do you guarantee that the translation will be accepted by a bank, university, or consulate?
faq.a: No. Acceptance of a translation depends on the requirements of the specific bank, university, consulate, immigration authority, notary, or other organization. Before using the translation for official purposes, the customer must independently verify the requirements of the receiving party.

faq.q: When is an official translation needed?
faq.a: An official translation is usually needed when the receiving party requires a translation with translator review, translator signature, Provider stamp, or additional confirmation. If a standard electronic translation is insufficient, choose the official service level.

faq.q: Can notarial certification be added later?
faq.a: In some cases yes, if a partner process is available for the selected document, language, and jurisdiction. Availability, timeline, and cost of notarization are confirmed separately.

kazakhstanCertified.pricingSubheadline: Electronic translation is the base service level. Translation with agent stamp is a separate service level with human translator review.
